Projects.Name: Customer Service Chatbot (Fortune 500 Insurance Company)
Details: Implemented semantic chunking RAG chatbot for insurance policy Q&A, boosting accuracy to 91%
Created pipeline to normalize HTML, JPEG, and DOCX documents
Evaluated bot on 1,000+ synthetic queries using LLM-as-a-judge and human-in-the-loop

Projects.Name: LLM Data & Evaluation (Applied Research)
Details: Built and deployed fault-tolerant Text-to-JSON REST service
Reduced marketing review time from 2.5 days to ~3 hours using GPT-3.5 Turbo
Performed log analysis, debugging, and reliability improvements

Projects.Name: Inventory Recommendation System (Major FMCG Company)
Details: Led recommendation system improving inventory efficiency by 13%
Boosted forecasting accuracy from 86% to 93% using XGBoost and clustering

Projects.Name: Improving Small Reasoning Models with Masked Critique Fine-Tuning
Details: Improved AMC accuracy by 12.5% and MATH 500 by 12% via masked critique fine-tuning of DeepScaleR-1.5B (16K context)
Expanded LIMO dataset using Gemini-2.5-Pro generated critiques

Projects.Name: Fine-tuning SLMs on Text-to-SQL Reasoning Chains
Details: Improved accuracy from 76% to 79% via LoRA fine-tuning of CodeS-7B
Generated synthetic reasoning chains for Spider 1.0 with 94%/92%/90% train/val/test accuracy using GPT-4o
